name: SOUL BATTERY

abilities.name: By Your Side
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to place itself in base contact with a unique ally within 12".

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Energy Drain
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3. An ally within range may heal an amount equal to the damage suffered.

triggers.name: Unchecked Power
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare a tactical action.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.

actions.name: Dark Bargain
actions.effects: Deal 1 irreducible damage to the target, then the target may declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Aetheric Surge
triggers.text: The target may declare the Charge action.

actions.name: Excess Power
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, increase the (x) of this action by 2". Allies within range heal 2.

extraction_notes: STN: 10 appears below the character artwork
Keywords section appears empty after the diamond bullet
